layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative pb-24 bg-[#050505] text-white overflow-x-hidden

surface_strategies.premium_card: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/[0.05] rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] overflow-hidden
surface_strategies.interactive_card: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/[0.05] rounded-3xl active:scale-[0.98] transition-all cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/[0.05]
surface_strategies.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050505]/90 border-t border-white/[0.08] px-2 py-3 sm:px-4 flex justify-between items-center max-w-md mx-auto

hold_to_earn_button.wrapper: relative flex items-center justify-center w-64 h-64 mx-auto my-12
hold_to_earn_button.button: w-48 h-48 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-b from-[#1a1a1f] to-[#050505] border border-[#FF2A3A]/30 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(255,42,58,0.15)] flex flex-col items-center justify-center z-10 select-none
hold_to_earn_button.progress_ring: absolute inset-0 rounded-full border-4 border-transparent border-t-[#00E676] animate-spin
hold_to_earn_button.interaction: Use framer-motion whileTap={{ scale: 0.92 }}. Button must feel weighty.

referral_pool.bar_fill: h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF2A3A] to-[#FF8080] shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(255,42,58,0.6)] rounded-full

wallet_balance.amount: text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white flex items-baseline gap-2 font-display

primary_cta.classes: w-full py-4 rounded-2xl bg-white text-black font-bold tracking-tight hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center gap-2

secondary_cta.classes: w-full py-4 rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/[0.1] text-white font-semibold transition-colors active:scale-95 hover:bg-white/[0.08] flex items-center justify-center gap-2

image_urls.description: Dark obsidian texture. Use with 5-10% opacity, absolute positioned behind the main interface to add cinematic grain.

testing_attributes.rule: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='hold-button', data-testid='nav-home', data-testid='nav-wallet', data-testid='withdraw-submit', data-testid='copy-memo-btn'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Import fonts in index.html or global css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Unbounded:wght@400;600;700&display=swap');
Configure tailwind.config.js to extend fonts: { fontFamily: { sans: ['Manrope', 'sans-serif'], display: ['Unbounded', 'sans-serif'] } }
Since it's a Telegram Mini App, lock the layout to a mobile width container (max-w-md mx-auto) with a dark background outside it to simulate mobile on desktop.
Implement 7 screens/views: Home (Hold to Earn + Stats), Wallet, Withdraw, Deposit, Transactions, Missions, Referrals.
Use a bottom navigation bar with 5 tabs: Home, Wallet, Missions, Referrals, History.
For the Hold to Earn mechanic, implement a robust visually rewarding state with framer-motion (scale down on press, glowing ring, haptic-like visual feedback).
For the Wallet flow (Deposit/Withdraw), prioritize clarity. The deposit screen must prominently display the Address and the MEMO with easy one-tap copy buttons.
For the Withdraw flow, use a step-by-step or clean single-form layout: Asset -> Amount -> Address -> Confirm.
Ensure the remaining TRX pool in the Referral section looks urgent and visually scarce (use the red gradient pool bar).
Avoid generic AI dashboard looks. Keep it cinematic, with deep obsidian backgrounds, high contrast text, and glowing neon accents only for critical metrics/buttons.
Use standard React .js syntax, no TypeScript.
Do not use generic UI cards. Implement the custom `premium_card` surface strategy.
